title: Display
text: Display Specify how the glyph is displayed on the form. The Primary File and Secondary File check boxes are used to specify the glyph. If Primary File is selected, the primary file is viewed as part of a glyph. If a secondary file has been specified, select Secondary File to view the secondary file as part of the glyph. The complete glyph is only displayed when both check boxes are selected. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
